title: pimelea ferruginea
intro: Pimelea ferruginea, also known as rusty pimelea, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Pimelea ferruginea include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and is also used in traditional Aboriginal medicine.
